name: Natsuki Wants You (To Pay Attention To Her)
description:
"If... If it's not too much to ask... I want you to make me feel good.

...Please?"

Who knew that being nice to girls can lead to them developing feelings to you? Well, certainly not you, you dense idiot. All those hints, all those subtle messages... All of it went right over your head. It's almost impressive.

However, Natsuki isn't exactly happy with that. Annoyed at how oblivious you are (and probably scared that Monika will steal you away), this strawberry shortstack decides to act. And she's shooting to kill.

Don't keep a poor girl waiting.
creator: TheVøid
